tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix route handler leak + env-configurable browser semaphore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminate TargetClosedError flood by draining in-flight route callbacks before closing pages, guarantee browser cleanup via try/finally, expose BROWSER_SEMAPHORE_SIZE env var.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/scraper.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_scraper.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -m pytest tests/test_scraper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BROWSER_SEMAPHORE_SIZE env var respected", "unroute_all called before context.close", "try/finally guarantees browser close on exception", "All new scraper tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update api-detection-langue-fr CLAUDE.md (Camoufox + env vars)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Correct stale Chromium-only statement, document new env vars.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -E 'Camoufox|BROWSER_SEMAPHORE_SIZE' apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Camoufox documented as primary browser", "Env var table added", "Caller contract referenced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add Prometheus metrics module + /metrics endpoint + scraper instrumentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create metrics module, expose /metrics, instrument browser launch timing.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/metrics.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_metrics.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/main.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/scraper.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/requirements.txt"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -m pytest tests/test_metrics.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prometheus-client added", "Six metrics defined", "/metrics endpoint serves Prometheus format", "Browser launch timing labeled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Docker resource limits + healthcheck + Uvicorn --limit-concurrency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Container-level safety nets.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docker-compose.yml", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/Dockerfile"], "verifyCommand": "docker compose config | grep -A 20 api-detection-langue-fr-service", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mem_limit 4500m", "cpus 4", "Healthcheck on /api/v1/health", "Uvicorn --limit-concurrency 50"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AdmissionController class with atomic counter tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Atomic in-flight counter primitive.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/admission.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -m pytest tests/test_admission.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["acquire True/False based on counter", "release does not go negative", "Atomic under 100 concurrent acquires", "inflight property observable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Admission middleware with path-scoped controllers + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FastAPI middleware emitting 503+Retry-After on saturation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/middleware/__init__.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/middleware/admission.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_middleware.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -m pytest tests/test_admission_middleware.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Path-based controller selection", "503+Retry-After on saturation", "Debug pool isolated from prod", "Infra paths bypass", "Kill switch works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wire admission middleware into main.py with env-driven config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Instantiate controllers and attach middleware.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -c 'from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from main import app; assert TestClient(app).get(\"/api/v1/health\").status_code == 200; print(\"OK\")'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Controllers from env vars", "Middleware attached", "/health responds 200"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: InflightDedup class for URL coalescing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** URL coalescing primitive sharing one future across concurrent callers.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/inflight_dedup.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_inflight_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -m pytest tests/test_inflight_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Factory runs once for concurrent same-key callers", "Different keys independent", "Entry cleaned after success and exception", "hits counter accurate"]}
```

tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -m pytest tests/ -v --ignore=tests/test_api.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetch_html wrapped in coalesce", "force_refresh bypasses dedup", "DEDUP_HITS synced", "No regressions"]}
```
